summary: End-to-end verification of iteration 2 (admin services CRUD + DB-backed services + topbar address + new logo). 20/20 backend pytest cases pass: GET /api/services returns 6 seeded services with proper schema; POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/services work with x-admin-token, return 401 without auth, 404 for unknown id, 400 for empty PATCH body. Updates persist (verified via public GET). Bookings flow & admin login still 100%. Frontend: navbar shows address (Rudrapur Road, Beside Punjab National Bank, Gauribazar, Deoria, Uttar Pradesh, 274202), phone +91 9695178760, email; logo /mb-logo.png returns 200. Admin dashboard shows tab-bookings + tab-services. Add/edit/delete service via UI all work; price change reflected in admin list and public home #pricing after reload. Mobile (390x844) viewport also shows topbar address. All TEST_ services cleaned up; DB now has the 6 default services.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated — migrate to FastAPI lifespan context manager.

seed_services() runs on every startup; idempotent because gated by count, but consider an upsert strategy if defaults are ever updated (current code won't apply default changes once collection has any docs).

ServiceUpdate filters out None but also filters out legitimate empty-string description updates ({k:v for k,v in ... if v is not None}). Empty string is allowed by Pydantic and would be excluded by 'exclude_unset' alone — current behaviour treats omitted vs explicit-empty the same, fine for MVP.
ServiceCreate validates min_length on name but PATCH ServiceUpdate has no constraints (e.g., negative price could be sent). Suggest adding ge=0 / min_length on ServiceUpdate fields.
Public GET /api/services has no caching headers — for high-traffic pages, consider a small TTL ETag.
Admin token is stored in localStorage (XSS risk) — acceptable for MVP single-admin scenario but flag for hardening.
ServicesAdmin.jsx: 'load()' is called inside save/remove rather than optimistically updating list; minor latency UX nit, not a bug.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Curtain Wash, TEST_UI Service, TEST_DeleteFlow during pytest + UI runs. All cleaned up at end (manual + pytest cleanup fixture). DB now has the 6 default services only.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Admin token via POST /api/admin/login -> {token}. Use header x-admin-token: <token>. UI selectors: tab-bookings, tab-services, add-service-btn, svc-new-form, svc-edit-form, svc-form-name, svc-form-price, svc-form-unit, svc-form-desc, svc-form-save, svc-form-cancel, svc-row-{id}, svc-edit-{id}, svc-delete-{id}, topbar-address/phone/email. Delete uses native window.confirm — accept it via page.on('dialog', ...). Login form uses data-testid='admin-username' and 'admin-password' (the underlying inputs do NOT have type='text' on username, use the data-testid).
rca of the issue: No issues found in this iteration.
